stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Identify the potential hazards for a flight from Shannon (53°N 009°W) to Warsaw (52°N 021°E) at FL120. The flight will...

options.a: Pass through an area of thunderstorms, hail, moderate or severe icing and turbulence, cross below a jet stream and associated CAT area and finally encounter an area of moderate turbulence and moderate icing.
options.b: Cross through an area of CAT passing below the jet stream core and later through an area of moderate turbulence.
options.c: Encounter no hazards although it will pass both above and below areas of significant weather and CAT.
options.d: Pass below a CAT area but through an area of moderate turbulence and moderate icing.
